description: The Sales Director wants to refine the pipeline to distinguish between initial proposals and final contracts. Refactor the CRM pipeline by renaming the 'Proposition' stage to 'Proposition (Draft)' and adding a new stage named 'Proposition (Final)' immediately following it. Update the pipeline so that all opportunities currently in 'Proposition (Draft)' with a probability greater than 70% are moved to 'Proposition (Final)', while those with 70% or lower remain in 'Proposition (Draft)'.
